---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT

events_products_code AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

events_products_variants_code AS PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK,

events_country_code AS COUNTRY_CODE,

events_country_description_en AS COUNTRY_DESCRIPTION,

events_defaultLanguage_description_en AS DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION,

Check constraint name of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

CKT_MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG


Server validation rule of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

drop table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG2 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG2
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG2 (

);

alter table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG2 set comment = 'Master data entity representing a product as marketed by the organization - together with its specific variants - covering the key product code and (where applicable) the distinct variant code; descriptive attributes (e.g., category, flavor, device version), variant characteristics (e.g., color, size, nicotine level), technical details, pricing/quantity, and regulatory or commercial flags. It provides the complete set of properties needed for product and variant identification, governance, and lifecycle management.';
